latin: Angeli de caelo descendebant et Tokium Tertium delere volebant. solum pueri in machinis giganteis contra eos pugnare poterant. sed vera pugna non contra angelos erat — contra solitudinem suam erat.

questions.prompt: What is described as the real fight?
questions.target: The fight against their own loneliness
choices: The fight against their own loneliness

translation: Angels were descending from the sky and wanted to destroy Tokyo-3. Only children in gigantic machines could fight against them. But the real fight was not against the Angels — it was against their own loneliness.
